title: polygala poaya
intro: Polygala polyphylla, also known as Polygala poaya, is a flowering plant species within the milkwort family, native to tropical Africa. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Polygala poaya include its potential to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Polygala poaya typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and roots, which are consumed as teas or taken in capsule form.
